WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

 Formula guardedness
====================

  Lemma `L' cannot be converted to a guarded formula:
    unguarded variable(s) '#j' in the subformula
      "∀ x #i #j. ((A( x ) @ #i) ∧ (#i < #j)) ⇒ (#i = #j)"
    in the formula
      "∀ x #i #j. ((A( x ) @ #i) ∧ (#i < #j)) ⇒ (#i = #j)"
*/
